output.code:
spans = []
candidates = [
"وَلَنَبْلُوَنَّكُمْ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنَ الْخَوْفِ وَالْجُوعِ وَنَقْصٍ مِّنَ الْأَمْوَالِ وَالْأَنفُسِ وَالثَّمَرَاتِ وَبَشِّرِ الصَّابِرِينَ",
"إِنَّ عِظَمَ الْجَزَاءِ مَعَ عِظَمِ الْبَلاءِ، وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ إِذَا أَحَبَّ قَوْمًا ابْتَلاهُمْ، فَمَنْ رَضِيَ فَلَهُ الرِّضَا، وَمَنْ سَخِطَ فَلَهُ السَّخَطُ",
"وَنَبْلُوهُمْ بِمَا صَبَرُوا"
]
for c in candidates:
    idx = s.find(c)
    print(c[:30], idx)
    if idx!=-1:
        spans.append((idx, idx+len(c), c))
# second occurrence of 156 appears twice; find all
start = 0
occ=[]
while True:
    i = s.find(candidates[2], start)
    if i==-1: break
    occ.append((i,i+len(candidates[2])))
    start = i+1
occ

results=[]
for start,end,text in [(164,164+len(candidates[0]),candidates[0]),(352,352+len(candidates[1]),candidates[1])]+occ:
    assert s[start:end]==text
    typ = "Aya" if text.startswith("و") or text.startswith("وَ") or text in [candidates[0],candidates[2]] else "Hadeeth"
    # better classify by surrounding cues: check 64 chars before/after
    context = s[max(0,start-64):min(len(s),end+64)]
    if "قال النبي" in context or "قال النبي" in s[max(0,start-80):min(len(s),end+80)] or "قال رسول" in context or "الترمذي" in context:
        typ="Hadeeth"
    if "قال تعالى" in context or "سورة" in context or "الآية" in context:
        typ="Aya"
    results.append((start,end,text,typ))
results

results=[]
items = [ (164,164+len(candidates[0]),candidates[0]), (352,352+len(candidates[1]),candidates[1]) ]
for o in occ:
    items.append((o[0],o[1],candidates[2]))
for start,end,text in items:
    assert s[start:end]==text
    context = s[max(0,start-64):min(len(s),end+64)]
    typ="Aya"
    if "الترمذي" in context or "قال النبي" in context or "قال رسول" in context or "قال ﷺ" in context or "في الحديث" in context:
        typ="Hadeeth"
    results.append({"span_start":start,"span_end":end,"span_text":text,"citation_type": "Aya" if typ=="Aya" else "Hadeeth"})
results
